findings.title: BentoML Unauthenticated OpenAPI Schema Disclosure (13 instances)
findings.description: GET /docs.json returns full OpenAPI schema including service name, version string, all inference route paths, and request/response schemas. No authentication required across 13 confirmed instances. Service names identify operators including NestleModel (Nestle, Azure NL), rakuten_text_service (Rakuten, IONOS DE), TwilioChatBot (GCP US), ragqa_service (GCP US), motion-detector (OVH FR), Inside360, AoLang, ComfyService.

findings.title: BentoML Pickle Deserialization RCE CVE-2026-44345 (8 unpatched instances)
findings.description: 8 of 13 confirmed BentoML instances run versions below v1.4.39 and are vulnerable to CVE-2026-44345, a pickle deserialization RCE via crafted bento package. No authentication required to trigger. Affected: ragqa_service v1.1.10 (GCP), onari_ml (Hetzner), AoLang v0.5.7, motion-detector (OVH). Remote code execution on inference server.

findings.title: BentoML Double RCE Chain CVE-2025-27520 on ragqa_service v1.1.10
findings.description: ragqa_service at 34.144.180.225 (GCP US) runs BentoML v1.1.10, vulnerable to both CVE-2026-44345 (pickle RCE, unpatched below v1.4.39) and CVE-2025-27520 (RCE chain, unpatched below v1.4.8). Double-CVE intersection on a RAG QA service suggests active LLM workloads with potential knowledge base access.

findings.title: BentoML Prometheus /metrics Endpoint Unauthenticated
findings.description: GET /metrics exposed without authentication across all 13 confirmed BentoML instances. Returns model request rates, inference latency histograms, error counts, and service health status. Enables operational intelligence gathering on inference workloads.

findings.title: BentoML motion-detector NATS Config Potentially Exposed
findings.description: motion-detector service at 54.37.252.187:3000 (OVH FR) exposes /add_camera and likely /get_full_config endpoints. NATS message broker integration in motion detection AI service may leak broker URL with credentials. Requires verification.
